transcript: Speaker A (AI): माझा हात पकड [Hold my hand] Hold my hand. Speaker B (Human): Hold my hand. Speaker A (AI): धीर धर [Have patience] Have patience. Speaker B (Human): Have patience. Speaker A (AI): वर जा [Go upstairs] Go upstairs. Speaker B (Human): Go upstairs. Speaker A (AI): झोपायला जा [Go to bed] Go to bed. Speaker B (Human): Go to bed. Speaker A (AI): मी तुझ्यावर चिडली आहे. [I am angry with you] I am angry with you. Speaker B (Human): I am angry with you. Speaker A (AI): मला माहित नाही. [I don't know] I don't know. Speaker B (Human): I don't know. Speaker A (AI): MySivi ॲप वर अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून इंग्लिश शिका. ते पण फक्त ३ रुपयांत. माझ्यासोबत कधीही कितीही वेळ प्रॅक्टिस करा. बोलणं, ग्रामर, सेंटेन्सेस, योग्य शब्द वापरणं सगळं एका ठिकाणी. [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi on MySivi app. That too for just 3 rupees. Practice with me anytime, for any duration. Speaking, grammar, sentences, using correct words, all in one place.] Speaker C (Voiceover): आत्ताच MySivi ॲप डाऊनलोड करा. [Download MySivi app now.]
on_screen_text: माझा हात पकड [Hold my hand] / Hold my hand, धीर धर [Have patience] / Have patience, वर जा [Go upstairs] / Go upstairs, झोपायला जा [Go to bed] / Go to bed, मी तुझ्यावर चिडली आहे [I am angry with you] / I am angry with you, मला माहित नाही [I don't know] / I don't know, MySivi अशाच माझ्यासोबत मराठीत बोलून English शिका [Learn English by speaking with me in Marathi like this], ते पण फक्त 3 रुपयांत [That too for just 3 rupees], Sale Ends Today, सगळं UNLOCK करा [Unlock everything], ३ दिवसांसाठी OFFER ₹३० ₹३ [3 days offer ₹30 ₹3], यानंतर ₹299/month कधीही Cancel करू शकता [After this ₹299/month, can cancel anytime], MySivi Pro फायदे [MySivi Pro benefits], २४/७ तुमचा Personal AI English Teacher [24/7 your Personal AI English Teacher], Start Trial at ₹3, माझ्यासोबत कधीही कितीही वेळ practice [Practice with me anytime, for any duration], बोलणं [Speaking], Grammar, Sentences, योग्य शब्द वापरणं [Using correct words], सगळं एका ठिकाणी [All in one place], MySivi English speaking app Install Now
summary: A split-screen ad demonstrating English learning through Marathi translation practice with an AI avatar. It highlights the MySivi app as a 24/7 personal tutor and offers a 3-day trial for ₹3.
